About Me

Building Software,
Inspiring Developers

Passionate and dedicated Software Developer with experience in developing mobile and desktop applications using Flutter, C#, and C/C++. Skilled in building user-friendly, scalable, and efficient software solutions that solve real-world problems.

Experienced in developing management systems, mobile applications, and database-driven systems with a strong focus on performance and usability.

Beyond software development — experienced in programming instruction, customer support, software troubleshooting, and creating tutorial and promotional videos for software training and marketing purposes.
